items.name: Momo (Steam)
items.description: Traditional steamed dumplings; served with fresh pickle made of tomato & chilly.

items.name: Momo (Fried)
items.description: Fried dumplings.

items.name: Momo (Chilli)
items.description: Stir-fried dumplings with spicy chilli sauce.

items.name: Momo (Jhol)
items.description: Steamed dumplings served in spicy soup.

items.name: Veg Momo Platter
items.description: A generous platter of 18 veg momo - 6 steamed, 6 fried, and 6 chilli, offering a perfect mix of classic and bold flavours.

items.name: Chicken Momo Platter
items.description: A generous platter of 18 chicken momo - 6 steamed, 6 fried, and 6 chilli, offering a perfect mix of classic and bold flavours.

items.name: Mix Momo Platter
items.description: A generous platter of mixed momos with Chicken, Buff, and Mutton - prepared steamed, fried, or chilli according to your preference, offering a variety of flavours in one plate.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Stir-fried noodles with fresh vegetables and traditional spices.

items.name: Sadheko Chowmein
items.description: Spicy cold noodle salad with traditional Nepali seasonings

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: Hearty noodle soup with mixed vegetables in flavorful broth

items.name: Curry
items.description: Slow-cooked with traditional Nepali spices in a Nepali-style gravy.

items.name: Aloo kakra ko achar (sadheko)
items.description: Spicy potato salad with traditional Nepali seasonings and herbs

items.name: Chou Chou Sadheko
items.description: Chou Chou tossed with mustard oil, lemon, chilli, and Nepali spices - light, tangy, and refreshing.

items.name: Mustang Aloo
items.description: Traditional Mustang-style potatoes with aromatic spices

items.name: Veg Choila
items.description: Spiced mixed vegetable salad with traditional Newari seasonings

items.name: Pakoda (6 pieces)
items.description: Crispy fritters made with mixed vegetables and gram flour

items.name: Laphing (dry/soup)
items.description: Cold mung bean noodles served dry or in soup with spicy sauce

items.name: Choila
items.description: Grilled meat marinated with authentic Newari spice blend

items.name: Sekuwa
items.description: Grilled marinated meat with traditional Nepali spices and aromatic herbs

items.name: Chicken Chilli
items.description: Spicy chicken stir-fried with bell peppers and onions

items.name: Chicken Lollipop (6 pieces)
items.description: Crispy chicken drumettes marinated in spices and deep-fried

items.name: Chicken Sausage (2 pieces)
items.description: Homemade spiced chicken sausages grilled to perfection

items.name: Chatpate (Dry/Gilo)
items.description: A spicy mix of puffed rice, noodles, potato, and zesty spices. A crunchy street-style favourite.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: Crispy hollow puris filled with spiced potato mix and tangy flavoured water. It's a burst of flavours in every bite.

items.name: Shabalay
items.description: Crispy fried pastries filled with seasoned filling in Tibetan-Nepali style.

items.name: Aloo Nimki
items.description: Crispy fried dough bites with spiced potato. Crunchy and flavorful. An authentic Nepali street-style treat.

items.name: Bhatmaas Sadheko
items.description: Roasted soyabeans tossed with onions, spices, and a tangy Nepali twist.

items.name: Goat Bhuttan
items.description: A traditional Nepali delicacy made from goat tripe and intestines, slow-cooked with traditional spices.

items.name: Buff Sukuti
items.description: Traditional dried buffalo meat sautéed with Nepali spices, garlic, ginger, and herbs.

items.name: Thakali Khana
items.description: A wholesome Nepali set with steamed rice, lentils, seasonal vegetables, greens, pickles, and flavorful curry

items.name: Biryani
items.description: A fragrant mix of basmati rice and aromatic spices, slow-cooked to perfection

items.name: Hamro Nepali Kitchen Meat Platter
items.description: A hearty mix of Nepali-style chicken favourites - momo, lollipop, biryani, choila, chowmein, and chilli. Perfect for sharing

items.name: Hamro Nepali Kitchen Veg Platter
items.description: A wholesome veg platter featuring Veg Biryani, Paneer Chilli, Soyabean Choila, Veg Chowmein, 6 Veg momo, and 6 crispy pakoras - perfect for sharing.

items.name: Potato Fries
items.description: Crispy golden potato fries, perfect for kids

items.description: Chicken nuggets served with crispy chips
